title: Content Marketing & Resource-Center Lead Conversion Analytics
dataSources:
Primary engagement spine in index=business: **ga4:enhanced_measurement** / **ga4:report** events carrying page_location, percent_scrolled, event_name, user_engagement_duration, file_download, and video_percent aligned to content_asset_id tags mirrored from CMS REST (WordPress /wp-json/wp/v2/posts, HubSpot /cms/v3/pages/site-pages, contentful:webhook payloads, Adobe AEM cq:Page paths published via Dispatcher).
Heat-map corroboration: **hotjar:scroll_event** / **hotjar:heatmap_event** REST pulls (GET /api/v2/sites/{site_id}/heatmaps) plus optional **clarity:session_event** heatmaps when privacy controls limit Hotjar sampling.
Lead conversion proof: **hubspot:form_submission**, **marketo:rest_api** (/rest/v1/activities.json), **pardot:form_event**, **eloqua:form_event** depending on MAP stack—each row must expose landing_uri plus lifecycle outcomes (lifecyclestage, lead_status, activityType).
Organic authority telemetry: **ahrefs:keyword_ranking** (/v3/site-explorer/organic-keywords) or **gsc:search_analytics** (/webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}/searchAnalytics/query) joined on page and landing_page URLs.
Rich media signals: **vidyard:view_event**, **wistia:view_event**, **zoom:webinar_registration** / **zoom:webinar_event** replays mapped to asset_key.
Cost ingestion: content_asset_cost.csv (hours × blended rate + freelancer + video + design + selective promo_usd boosts) maintained from Asana, Monday.com, or Notion editorial pipelines.
CRM enrichment (optional companion index rows already landed elsewhere): salesforce:lead / salesforce:contact snapshots referencing recent_conversion_page and utm_content—never duplicate UC-23.3.1 finance mart joins.
app: Splunk HTTP Event Collector (platform core) + Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) for warehouse snapshots + Splunk Add-on for Salesforce ([Splunkbase 3549](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/3549)) when salesforce:lead ingest exists + optional Splunk Add-on Builder modular REST workers polling Ahrefs, Google Analytics Data API, Hotjar, Google Search Console, HubSpot, and Marketo.
spl:
index=business (sourcetype="ga4:enhanced_measurement" OR sourcetype="ga4:report" OR sourcetype="hotjar:scroll_event" OR sourcetype="hubspot:form_submission" OR sourcetype="marketo:rest_api" OR sourcetype="ahrefs:keyword_ranking" OR sourcetype="gsc:search_analytics") earliest=-90d@d
| eval asset_key=lower(trim(coalesce(content_asset_id,page_location,landing_page_url,page_url,"")))
| eval asset_family=case(match(asset_key,"(?i)/blog/"),"blog",match(asset_key,"(?i)/(resources|guides|learn)/"),"resource_center",match(asset_key,"(?i)/(webinars|events)/"),"webinar_archive",match(asset_key,"(?i)/(customers|case-studies)/"),"case_study",match(asset_key,"(?i)/(glossary|dictionary)/"),"glossary",1=1,"other")
| eval scroll_pct=tonumber(coalesce(scroll_depth_pct,percent_scrolled,viewport_bottom_pct,"0"))
| eval dwell_raw=coalesce(engagement_time_msec,user_engagement_duration_sec,time_on_page_seconds,"0")
| eval dwell_sec=if(tonumber(dwell_raw)>200000,tonumber(dwell_raw)/1000,tonumber(dwell_raw))
| eval qualified_read=if(scroll_pct>=75 AND dwell_sec>=60,1,0)
| eval nm=lower(trim(coalesce(event_name,activity_type_name,action,"")))
| eval cta_hit=if(match(nm,"cta_click|select_content|generate_lead|file_download"),1,0)
| eval anon_key=coalesce(user_pseudo_id,hotjar_user_id,visitor_uuid,ga_client_id,cid,"")
| eval kw_position=tonumber(coalesce(ahrefs_keyword_position,organic_average_position,position,""))
| stats earliest(kw_position) as rank_open latest(kw_position) as rank_now dc(anon_key) as uniq_visitors sum(qualified_read) as qreads sum(cta_hit) as cta_clicks avg(scroll_pct) as avg_scroll avg(dwell_sec) as avg_dwell by asset_key asset_family
| eval rank_delta=rank_now-rank_open
| eval engagement_score=round(min(100,max(0,(avg_dwell*0.3)+(avg_scroll*0.2)+((cta_clicks/nullif(uniq_visitors,0))*50))),2)
| lookup content_asset_cost.csv asset_key OUTPUT sme_hours_q freelancer_usd video_usd design_usd promo_usd loaded_hourly_usd pillar_asset_key supporting_weight
| fillnull value=0 sme_hours_q freelancer_usd video_usd design_usd promo_usd loaded_hourly_usd supporting_weight
| eval loaded_hourly_usd=if(loaded_hourly_usd=0,175,loaded_hourly_usd)
| eval loaded_cost=round((sme_hours_q*loaded_hourly_usd)+freelancer_usd+video_usd+design_usd+promo_usd,2)
| join type=left asset_key [search index=business sourcetype IN ("hubspot:workflow_event","marketo:smart_campaign_event","salesforce:lead") earliest=-90d@d|eval ak=lower(trim(coalesce(attributed_page_url,landing_page,"")))|eval ls=lower(trim(coalesce(lifecyclestage,Status,hs_lead_status,lead_status,"")))|stats sum(eval(if(match(ls,"marketingqualified|mql|lead|subscriber"),1,0))) as mql_cnt sum(eval(if(match(ls,"salesqualified|sql|opportunity|customer"),1,0))) as sql_cnt by ak|rename ak as asset_key]
| fillnull value=0 mql_cnt sql_cnt
| eval mql_conv_pct=if(uniq_visitors>0,round(100*mql_cnt/uniq_visitors,3),null())
| eval sql_from_mql_pct=if(mql_cnt>0,round(100*sql_cnt/mql_cnt,2),null())
| eval cost_per_mql=if(mql_cnt>0,round(loaded_cost/mql_cnt,2),null())
| eval pillar_ratio=if(isnotnull(pillar_asset_key) AND pillar_asset_key=asset_key,uniq_visitors/nullif(supporting_weight,0),null())
| eval decay_signal=case(rank_delta>5 AND rank_now>12,"seo_slide",avg_scroll<38 AND qreads/nullif(uniq_visitors,0)<0.15,"thin",1=1,"stable")
| sort - mql_conv_pct|head 200|table asset_key asset_family uniq_visitors qreads avg_scroll engagement_score mql_conv_pct sql_from_mql_pct cost_per_mql rank_delta decay_signal pillar_ratio
description: Splunk correlates **ga4:enhanced_measurement** scroll, dwell, file_download, and video_progress sequences with **hotjar:scroll_event** depth ladders plus Microsoft Clarity heatmap slices where available, **hubspot:form_submission** / **marketo:rest_api** form fills, and MAP lifecycle transitions so each content_asset_id exposes qualified_read, engagement_score, mql_conv_pct, sql_from_mql_pct, and loaded cost_per_mql after joining creative-cost lookups. Parallel **ahrefs:keyword_ranking** or **gsc:search_analytics** feeds power rank_open, rank_now, rank_delta, and decay_signal flags when pillar_ratio cluster math suggests stale pillars—explicitly distinct from blended attribution (UC-23.3.1), generic funnel waterfalls (UC-23.3.2), ESP telemetry (UC-23.3.3), raw Apache channel splits (UC-23.3.4), or paid-media CPA dashboards (UC-23.3.5).
value: Demand-gen leadership ranks blogs, gated papers, webinar replays, and glossary hubs by marketing-qualified outcomes—not vanity sessions—and pairs those rankings with loaded creative costs so CFO-ready narratives explain whether editorial calendars repay freelancer invoices. Product marketing sees sql_from_mql_pct variance across asset_family slices (case studies versus top-funnel explainers) before sales blames nurture. RevOps triggers refresh sprints when decay_signal plus rank_delta confirm both engagement softening and SERP erosion, shrinking the lag between noticing competitors’ refreshed topic clusters and shipping new outlines—without leaning on blended cross-channel ROI packs (UC-23.3.1) or auction CPA tiles (UC-23.3.5).
implementation: Normalize asset_key across CMS REST (/wp-json/wp/v2/posts, HubSpot /cms/v3/pages/site-pages, contentful:webhook publish payloads), GA4 exports, Hotjar plus Clarity ingest, Marketo /rest/v1/activities, hubspot:form_submission, cost CSV lookups, and optional salesforce:lead enrichment; persist Dashboard Studio tiles comparing engagement_score vs mql_conv_pct with quarterly decay overlays sourced from Ahrefs and Search Console pulls.
visualization: Dashboard Studio: splunk.scatter plotting engagement_score versus mql_conv_pct sized by uniq_visitors and colored by asset_family; splunk.timeline overlaying rank_now against qualified_reads; splunk.singlevalue tiles for median cost_per_mql versus HubSpot-published calibration bands; splunk.table ranking pillar_ratio versus pillar_asset_key with decay_signal badges.

references.title: Adobe Marketo Engage REST API overview
Google Search Console API — Search Analytics query

knownFalsePositives:
- **Lifecycle-Stage Taxonomy Edits**: HubSpot lifecycle-stage renames (`subscriber` -> `marketingqualifiedlead`) without macro rebuild make `mql_cnt` jump overnight although reading behaviour never changed. Suppress via the lookup `lifecycle_stage_taxonomy_register.csv` keyed on `field_name`+`field_version` and a `where lifecycle_taxonomy_aligned=true` filter; freeze taxonomy edits monthly with ServiceNow CHG attestation.
- **Content-Asset URL Migration**: a CMS migration (Contentful -> WebflowCMS, WordPress -> Sanity) reshapes `uri_path`. Suppress via the change-window register `content_cms_migration_register.csv` keyed on `cms_release_id`+CHG_id (TTL <= 14 days post-release) and a `where NOT cms_migration_active` filter.
- **Gated-Asset Form Auto-Fill (B2B Identity Resolution)**: 6sense / Demandbase reverse-IP fills account fields, inflating MQL counts that look organic. Suppress via the lookup `b2b_reverse_ip_register.csv` keyed on `ip_block`+`account_signature` and a `where reverse_ip_resolution_complete=true` filter; require IP-allow-list verification before counting.
- **HubSpot Workflow / List Cascading Update**: bulk re-segmentation re-tags lifecycle stages and inflates conversion rates. Suppress via the change-window register `hubspot_workflow_release_register.csv` keyed on `workflow_id`+`schema_version`+CHG_id (TTL <= 7 days post-release) and a `where NOT workflow_cascade_active` filter.
- **HubSpot Property History API Lag**: property-history extracts lag the live workflow_event feed by 30-60 minutes. Suppress via the lookup `hubspot_property_history_lag_register.csv` keyed on `property_id`+`extract_window_id` (TTL <= 90 minutes) and a `where hubspot_property_history_synced=true` filter; require warehouse watermark audit before alerting.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Splunk roles that can search index=business (and optionally index=web for CDN corroboration) plus OAuth/API credentials for Google Analytics Data API, Hotjar REST, Ahrefs API v3, Google Search Console, HubSpot Private Apps, and Marketo REST polling workers on a Heavy Forwarder.
• Normalized asset identity discipline: every page, PDF landing, on-demand webinar replay, and glossary node must emit a shared content_asset_id (CMS primary key or slug) alongside the public URL so **ga4:enhanced_measurement** rows align with **hubspot:form_submission** and **marketo:rest_api** activities without fragile string matching alone.
• Governance for PII: hash or tokenize visitor keys at ingest; keep HEC tokens isolated from unrelated telemetry programs; document data-subject workflows before pulling session replay vendors such as FullStory-class feeds.
• Quarterly cost workbook (hours, freelance invoices, agency design, video edit, selective paid boosts) exported to content_asset_cost.csv inside lookups with asset_key as the stable join key.
• Topic-cluster hygiene file topic_cluster_map.csv listing pillar_asset_key, supporting_asset_key, and supporting_weight refreshed whenever editorial relocates spokes beneath new pillar URLs.

**Step 1 — Land multi-signal telemetry without collapsing sibling scopes**
Configure GA4 reporting or BigQuery batch export so Enhanced Measurement fields (scroll, file_download, video_progress, form_submit) arrive as **ga4:enhanced_measurement** or **ga4:report** events carrying page_location, percent_scrolled, file_extension, and video_percent. Pair those hits with **hotjar:scroll_event** slices pulled via GET /api/v2/sites/{site_id}/heatmaps scroll-map payloads where viewport_bottom_pct ladders (viewport_top, viewport_50pct, viewport_75pct) justify whether readers truly finish long guides versus bouncing after hero clicks.
For Adobe Experience Manager, anchor cq:Page paths (/content/site/en/blog/…) to the same page_location stem your dispatcher publishes; when CDN HTML lags publish jobs, correlate aem:page_view dispatcher timestamps against GA4 _time drift.
For WordPress, mirror /wp-json/wp/v2/posts IDs into Splunk using WPForms / Gravity Forms submission webhooks mapped to **wordpress:wpforms_submission** so gated PDF paths align with Yoast primary slug metadata.
HubSpot CMS Hub pulls should include **hubspot:cms_event** publish/version markers plus **hubspot:form_submission** payloads referencing content_id and pageUri.
Marketo Engage pulls /rest/v1/activities.json for Fill Out Form, Visit Web Page, Click Link with primaryAttributeValue pointing at landing URIs—emit **marketo:rest_api** rows Splunk can stitch using program_id plus campaign_id.
Parallel lanes for Strapi (**strapi:webhook** publish counters), Sanity (**sanity:webhook** dataset mutations), Drupal JSON:API (**drupal:jsonapi_event** node revisions), Contentful (**contentful:webhook** entry-publish signals), and Webflow (**webflow:cms_event** collection item_changed) explain why Splunk timestamps may precede analytics by minutes when CDNs prefetch HTML—document expected skew in the runbook instead of forcing false alerts during cutover weekends.

**Step 2 — Encode qualification math before revenue storytelling**
Persist macros that compute qualified_read when scroll_depth_pct>=75 and time_on_page_sec>=60 (match your UX definition—some teams insist ninety seconds on dense templates).
Implement engagement_score as (avg_time_on_page × 0.3) + (avg_scroll × 0.2) + (cta_clicks_per_visitor × 0.5 × 100) + (social_share_events × 0.4) capped at 100; the relative weights deliberately favor depth and CTA intent over raw GA4 engagement minutes.
Separate cta_click telemetry (**optimizely:experiment_event**, **adobe:target:experience_event**, VWO campaign JSON) from form_submit so hero-button experiments do not masquerade as pipeline creation.
Normalize anon_key across user_pseudo_id, hotjar_user_id, and hashed replay identifiers where privacy counsel permits FullStory-class joins.
Attach SME editorial effort plus freelancer invoices directly inside content_asset_cost.csv so Splunk divides loaded_cost by MAP-qualified totals rather than trusting spreadsheet averages alone.

**Step 3 — Layer decay and cluster diagnostics**
Schedule **ahrefs:keyword_ranking** or **gsc:search_analytics** pulls storing keyword, position, url, clicks, and impressions weekly so Splunk can compare rank_open against rank_now without waiting for quarterly business reviews.
Implement content_decay_flag when trailing-twelve-week organic clicks drop thirty percent versus the prior-four-quarter baseline and primary_keyword_position worsens by more than five rows—mirroring documented refresh studies where neglected posts surrender more than half of organic visits until copy, schema, and internal links refresh.
Maintain topic_cluster_map.csv linking pillar_asset_key to supporting_asset_key rows so Splunk can compute pillar_ratio = pillar_sessions divided by supporting_weight; ratios below one signal that a supporting article now carries the narrative and should be promoted or relinked.
Bring **vidyard:view_event** quartiles or **wistia:view_event** completion markers plus **zoom:webinar_registration** / **zoom:webinar_event** replay attendance into the same asset_key dimension so gated webinars stop looking invisible beside blog posts.
Cross-check Microsoft Clarity (**clarity:session_event**) scroll heatmaps against Hotjar when Clarity sampling is broader but anonymized—agree which platform becomes the escalation source of truth before leadership reviews.

**Step 4 — Finance-grade loaded cost and CRM bridges**
Join content_asset_cost.csv to allocate sme_hours_q, freelancer_usd, video_usd, design_usd, and promo_usd; divide by mql_cnt attributed through **hubspot:workflow_event** or **marketo:smart_campaign_event** transitions (marketingqualifiedlead, salesqualifiedlead) so creative operations see the same numerator marketing leadership approves.
Optional append pipeline outcomes (Closed Won) via salesforce:opportunity keyed by LeadSource only after enrichment adds originating_asset_key—never silently overwrite UC-23.3.1 blended ROI packs that already own cash-on-cash storytelling.
Dashboard footnotes cite HubSpot State of Marketing Report 2024 medians for blogs (about one to three percent MQL conversion), ebooks (about twelve to twenty percent gated medians), and on-demand webinars (about fifteen to thirty percent) purely as calibration bands—not internal SLAs.
Reference Content Marketing Institute B2B Benchmarks 2024 noting that fifty-two percent of marketers still struggle to prove effectiveness, which is why Splunk ties each asset_key to observable engagement, MAP states, and decay math rather than anecdotal applause.
Publish coaching overlays comparing sql_from_mql_pct across asset_family slices so sales leadership understands whether tutorials attract cooperative prospects versus curiosity clicks that stall in nurture.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting misleading Splunk indicators**
Duplicate sessions: Microsoft Clarity **clarity:heatmap** plus Hotjar both sampling the same DOM inflate uniq_visitors until dedupe macros collapse on anon_key.
Sampling bias: Hotjar business plans throttle recordings during traffic spikes—qualified_read denominators shrink even though GA4 counts remain whole.
Locale drift: AEM publishes /en-gb/ variants while GA4 strips locale folders—asset joins mis-route unless canonical_url macros normalize paths.
PDF clicks: file_download triggers without form_submit still boost cta_hit counters—exclude mime_type=pdf from CTA scoring when the gated landing expects HubSpot embed forms.
Podcast inflation: **podcast:download_event** bursts count listeners who never touch web qualified_read thresholds—exclude audio-only IDs from onsite engagement denominators.
Freelance invoices: lump-sum quarterly invoices divide unevenly across monthly cost_per_mql tiles until amortization lookups smooth freelancer_usd.
SEO volatility: Ahrefs keyword rankings jitter daily while gsc:search_analytics uses rolling averages—decay alarms temporarily flicker until streamstats median smoothing stabilizes rank_delta.
Marketo collisions: duplicated Fill Out Form activities after progressive profiling revisions double mql_cnt unless activity_id dedupe filters exist.
HubSpot lifecycle rewinds: recycled contacts bouncing between subscriber and marketingqualifiedlead inflate mql_cnt unless hs_v2_date_entered checkpoints gate counting.
Paid boosts: promo_usd spikes from LinkedIn lead gen boosts distort cost_per_mql unless promotion_scope tags isolate purely organic cohort weeks.
Iframe embeds: **hubspot:form_submission** fires inside iframe URLs lacking parent_page metadata—landing attribution drops to about:blank until postMessage telemetry arrives.
Consent modes: GA4 modeled conversions fill buckets while Hotjar suppresses EU recordings—engagement ratios diverge geographically though editorial quality unchanged.
CMS redirects: 308 chains strip utm_content parameters mid-flight—asset_family classification falters until redirect logs merge via Splunk transaction joins.
Vidyard autoplay: autoplay increments video_percent without conscious viewing—tie **vidyard:view_event** quartiles to user_initiated booleans before trusting tutorial completion stats.
SEMrush Position Tracking imports: when teams also poll **semrush:position_event**, confirm primary_keyword matches Ahrefs naming; otherwise decay_signal misfires because two vendors track different SERP features (local pack vs traditional ten-blue-links).
Zoom on-demand replays: registrant rows in **zoom:webinar_registration** may reference the live event ID while GA4 URLs point at the hosted replay slug—align IDs in CMS before Splunk merges webinar_family assets.

**Cross-platform sourcetype checklist:** **ga4:enhanced_measurement**, **ga4:report**, **aem:page_view**, **aem:asset_download**, **wordpress:rest_api**, **wordpress:wpforms_submission**, **wp:yoast_seo_event**, **webflow:cms_event**, **webflow:form_submission**, **contentful:webhook**, **contentful:content_event**, **sanity:webhook**, **sanity:groq_query**, **strapi:rest_event**, **strapi:webhook**, **drupal:jsonapi_event**, **drupal:webform_submission**, **hubspot:cms_event**, **hubspot:form_submission**, **hubspot:workflow_event**, **squarespace:cms_event**, **wix:velo_event**, **wix:form_event**, **hotjar:heatmap_event**, **hotjar:scroll_event**, **hotjar:recording_metadata**, **clarity:session_event**, **clarity:heatmap**, **contentsquare:zone_event**, **contentsquare:journey_event**, **fullstory:session_event**, **mouseflow:session_event**, **crazyegg:snapshot_event**, **ahrefs:keyword_ranking**, **ahrefs:backlink_event**, **semrush:position_event**, **semrush:content_audit**, **moz:url_metric**, **stat:rank_event**, **brightedge:datamind_event**, **brightedge:contentiq_audit**, **conductor:keyword_event**, **conductor:content_score**, **gsc:search_analytics**, **gsc:coverage_event**, **marketo:rest_api**, **marketo:smart_campaign_event**, **pardot:form_event**, **pardot:visitor_event**, **eloqua:form_event**, **eloqua:program_event**, **activecampaign:form_event**, **optimizely:experiment_event**, **vwo:campaign_event**, **adobe:target:experience_event**, **mutiny:personalization_event**, **asana:task_event**, **trello:card_event**, **notion:database_event**, **airtable:record_event**, **coschedule:content_event**, **vidyard:view_event**, **wistia:view_event**, **brightcove:view_event**, **vimeo:view_event**, **youtube:video_event**, **zoom:webinar_event**, **zoom:webinar_registration**, **gotowebinar:registration_event**, **on24:webcast_event**, **hopin:participation_event**, **podcast:download_event** must all pass through shared asset_key normalization macros, Splunk dedupe transforms, and governance-approved visitor-identity graphs before executives trust monthly leaderboards tied to freelancer invoices and SME hour burn.
grandmaExplanation: We track which guides and downloads people finish, whether they hit the signup button, and whether those contacts truly become qualified leads worth sales attention. When interest quietly fades or older guides slip down search results, we notice early enough to rewrite instead of guessing.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Inject 60 days of synthetic HubSpot lifecycle events plus content-engagement webhook events for 18,000 leads across 24 content assets. Days 1-30 use baseline: content-view->MQL=8.4%, MQL->SQL=42%, content-asset coverage=68%. Days 31-60 force content-view->MQL to drop to 2.1% via a content-asset URL migration (Contentful release CHG0021114). Confirm the saved search `content_marketing_funnel_anomaly_v3` fires with `severity=high`, `notable_index=notable`, attaches `bottleneck_stage=content_view_to_mql`, drives a SOAR playbook (`content_remediation_v2`) creating a Marketing-Operations Jira ticket, and notifies Head-of-Content via PagerDuty integration.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Pre-populate `content_cms_migration_register.csv` with `cms_release_id=CONTENTFUL_TO_SANITY_2025`, `change_start=now()-3d`, `change_end=now()+11d`, `change_ticket_id=CHG0021114`, `approver=content_ops@example.com`, `expected_mql_drop_pct=72`. Replay 14 days of synthetic events with content-view->MQL dropping 72% within the registered CMS-migration window. Confirm `content_marketing_funnel_anomaly_v3` does NOT fire (eval `cms_migration_active=1` excludes the cohort). Confirm the audit dashboard `ContentFunnelExceptions` records the suppression with reason=`cms_migration_window` and SHA-256 hash.

evidence: Dashboard Studio panel `ContentMarketingExec` archived weekly to `evidence_index` with `evidence_type=content_marketing_health` and a SHA-256 hash. Saved-search run history exported via `| rest /services/saved/searches/content_marketing_funnel_anomaly_v3` with `latest_runtime_iso` and result fingerprints. HubSpot / Salesforce HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature-verification logs cross-referenced with content-engagement events. ServiceNow CHG records linked from change-window registers; SOAR `content_remediation_v2` execution log retained 13 months in `index=audit`.
exclusions: Content-syndication via Outbrain / Taboola excluded (covered by UC-23.3.5). Influencer / podcast / video-sponsorship engagement out of scope (covered by UC-23.3.7). Customer-marketing / advocacy content (post-sale) tracked in UC-23.5.6. Internal Notion / Confluence content engagement excluded — measured in UC-23.7.3.
